description: Candidate discovery catalog for PPTX artifact comparison. Entries are classified as strategy skills, generator tools, or full pipelines so forkprobe can compare complete PPTX-producing pipelines rather than isolated writing skills.

roles.strategy: Improves content structure, narrative, scientific framing, or deck planning, but usually needs a generator to create PPTX.
roles.generator: Can create or edit PPTX artifacts from a prompt, outline, JSX, JSON, Markdown, or code.
roles.full_pipeline: Claims to convert source documents or structured content directly into PPTX or slide artifacts.
roles.baseline: Reference pipeline with no extra strategy skill.

candidates.name: baseline
candidates.summary_zh: 不使用额外 PPT 策略 skill，作为成品生成参照。
candidates.summary_en: No extra PPT strategy skill; used as the artifact-generation reference.
candidates.risk_zh: 必须搭配 PPTX 生成器，否则只能输出文字。
candidates.risk_en: Must be paired with a PPTX generator; otherwise it only produces text.

candidates.name: Presentations
candidates.summary_zh: Codex 本地高质量 PPTX 生成 pipeline，支持渲染预览和 QA。
candidates.summary_en: Local Codex PPTX generation pipeline with rendering and QA support.
candidates.risk_zh: 偏完整 artifact-tool 流程，执行较严谨但成本较高。
candidates.risk_en: Full artifact-tool workflow; reliable but more involved.

candidates.name: pptx
candidates.summary_zh: PowerPoint 文件结构、PptxGenJS、HTML-to-PPTX 或 OOXML 方向的生成/编辑管线。
candidates.summary_en: PPTX generation/editing pipeline for PowerPoint file structure, PptxGenJS, HTML-to-PPTX, or OOXML workflows.
candidates.risk_zh: 更偏底层文件控制，视觉 QA 需要单独执行。
candidates.risk_en: More file-structure oriented; visual QA should be run separately.

candidates.name: storyboard
candidates.summary_zh: 先梳理叙事流、页面节奏和场景化表达，适合作为偏叙事型 PPT 策略层。
candidates.summary_en: Plans narrative flow, slide rhythm, and scenario-based expression before generation.
candidates.risk_zh: 科研组会未必总需要强叙事，可能弱化证据矩阵和技术细节。
candidates.risk_en: Narrative-first framing may underweight evidence matrices or technical detail for lab meetings.

candidates.name: nature-paper2ppt
candidates.summary_zh: 面向 Nature 风格论文转汇报的结构规划 skill，适合科研文档转组会 PPT。
candidates.summary_en: Nature-style paper-to-deck planning skill for scientific documents and lab presentations.
candidates.risk_zh: 更像策略层，最终 PPTX 仍需要生成器。
candidates.risk_en: Acts mainly as a strategy layer; final PPTX still needs a generator.

candidates.name: academic-pptx-skill
candidates.summary_zh: 偏学术汇报结构增强：action title、证据链、每页一个 exhibit、少装饰。
candidates.summary_en: Academic deck strategy: action titles, evidence flow, one exhibit per slide, restrained visuals.
candidates.risk_zh: 主要管学术 PPT 逻辑和设计原则，不应单独作为 PPTX 生成候选。
candidates.risk_en: Mainly handles academic deck logic and design principles; should not be used alone as a PPTX generator.

candidates.name: powerpoint-skill
candidates.summary_zh: 偏论文/PDF 转 PPT 的技能候选，可能适合公式、论文图和技术型 deck。
candidates.summary_en: Candidate for paper/PDF-to-PPT workflows, useful for equations, paper figures, and technical decks.
candidates.risk_zh: 需要先验证 SKILL.md、依赖和最终 PPTX 产出路径。
candidates.risk_en: Needs verification for SKILL.md format, dependencies, and final PPTX output path.

candidates.name: ppt-master
candidates.summary_zh: 完整文档转 PPTX 系统候选，source document → strategist → executor → native editable PPTX。
candidates.summary_en: Full document-to-PPTX pipeline candidate: source document → strategist → executor → native editable PPTX.
candidates.risk_zh: 流程可能较重，需要验证依赖、运行时间和本地环境适配。
candidates.risk_en: Potentially heavy pipeline; dependencies, runtime, and local fit need verification.

candidates.name: md-slides
candidates.summary_zh: Markdown 到 slides 的轻量 pipeline，可作为结构清楚、快速生成的对照组。
candidates.summary_en: Lightweight Markdown-to-slides pipeline for a clear, fast-structured comparison baseline.
candidates.risk_zh: 更适合结构化 Markdown，视觉质量和科研图表表达可能有限。
candidates.risk_en: Best for structured Markdown; visual quality and scientific figure expression may be limited.

candidates.name: presentation-skill
candidates.summary_zh: 面向 Codex/ChatGPT agent 的 PPTX skill 候选，强调 outline.json 到 PPTX 的生成/编辑/QA。
candidates.summary_en: PPTX skill candidate for Codex/ChatGPT agents, emphasizing outline.json to PPTX generation/editing/QA.
candidates.risk_zh: 需要验证代码质量、依赖和是否适配当前 Codex 工具链。
candidates.risk_en: Needs verification for code quality, dependencies, and current Codex toolchain fit.

candidates.name: Anthropic pptx skill
candidates.summary_zh: Anthropic 官方 PPTX skill，可作为通用 PPTX 生成/编辑参考。
candidates.summary_en: Anthropic official PPTX skill, useful as a general PPTX generation/editing reference.
candidates.risk_zh: 需要检查 license、平台适配和是否能直接用于当前 Codex 环境。
candidates.risk_en: Check license, platform fit, and whether it can run directly in the current Codex environment.
